data.name: Carnage
data.effect: Killing a monster has {{}} chance to deal physical damage equal to 15% of its maximum health to all monsters in a small radius.

data.name: Curse

data.name: Adrenaline Burst
data.effect: Each time you're hit, you have a {{}}% chance to trigger a burst of adrenaline, boosting your speed by 150% for 10 seconds.

data.name: Bless
data.effect: Blesses you, reducing skill and experience loss by {{}}% when killed by the chosen creature.

data.name: Cleanse
data.effect: Each time you're hit, you have a {{}}% chance to cleanse one random negative status effect and gain temporary immunity to it for 11 seconds.

data.name: Cripple
data.effect: Your attacks have a {{}}% chance to paralyse the target for 10 seconds.

data.name: Fatal Hold
data.effect: Your attacks have a {{}}% chance to prevent creatures from fleeing due to low health for 30 seconds.

data.name: Gut
data.effect: Gutting the creature yields {{}}% more creature products.

data.name: Numb
data.effect: After being attacked, you have a {{}}% chance to paralyse the aggressor for 10 seconds.

data.name: Scavenge
data.effect: Increases your chance of successfully skinning/dusting a skinnable/dustable creature by {{}}%.
